About me

I believe great design is felt before it's seen — in the clarity of a form, the rhythm of a layout, the confidence of a colour.

With a background spanning SaaS platforms, e-commerce, and accessibility-focused redesigns, I bring both strategic thinking and hands-on craft to every project. I work closely with stakeholders to turn complex problems into elegant, usable solutions.

Figma User Research Prototyping Accessibility Design Systems Wireframing Interaction Design Usability Testing
